finding.title: Best Manager Identification
finding.exec_summary: Cara Losch is the best manager, with a win_rate of 0.6442953020134228, closed_deals of 745, won_deals of 480, won_revenue of 1130049.0, and avg_cycle_days_closed of 49.04026845637584 days.
risks: Risk of over-reliance on single metric
recommendations: Provide targeted training based on KPI gaps

finding.title: Second Best Analysis
finding.exec_summary: Analysis of second-best performance indicators for the West regional office, covering closed deals, won deals, revenue, average cycle days, and win rate.
